ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
m : MeasurableSpace Ω
X : Ω → Set ι
u : Set ι
p : ↑I
P : Measure Ω
hX : IsBernoulliOn X u p P
this :
  map X P = map (fun p => {i | p i}) (infinitePi fun i => toNNReal p • dirac (i ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False)
⊢ map (fun ω => u \ X ω) P =
    map (fun p => {i | p i}) (infinitePi fun i => toNNReal (σ p) • dirac (i ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ (σ p)) • dirac False)
